ops.title: Where the seats.aero Partner API key lives in 1Password and how getaway.sh resolves it
ops.body:
The seats.aero Pro API key (`pro_…`, 31 chars) is a 1Password **secure note** in the `OpenClaw` vault: reference `op://OpenClaw/SEATS_AERO_API_KEY/notesPlain`. It is NOT an API-credential item, so `op item get --fields credential` cannot fetch it — only `op read "op://OpenClaw/SEATS_AERO_API_KEY/notesPlain"` works.

`skills/getaway/getaway.sh` resolves the key as: env `SEATS_AERO_API_KEY` first, else the prefs `.op_ref` (an `op://` reference) via `op read`. The user's live `~/.getaway/preferences.json` has `op_ref` set to the path above. In the repo, direnv exports `.env`'s `SEATS_AERO_API_KEY` so the env path wins there. See [[capt-hook-transcript-api-version-skew]] for the sibling hook.
